title: Immunohistochemistry Protocol for Paraffin-Embedded Sections  - General
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"1dcoc","text":"For DAB:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4pbqn","text":"Solution-based: Sigma Cat# D5637; prepared in Tris buffer as per manufacturer's instructions","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"joid","text":"SIGMAFAST DAB Tablets: Sigma Cat# 4293","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":5,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8gmqu","text":"SIGMAFAST DAB with Metal Enhancer - SIgma Cat# 0426","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":5,"length":4}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dip slides in 100% Citrisolv 3 x 5 mins.
Incubate slides in 0.3% H 2 O 2 in methanol for 00:15:00 ( 500 µL of 30% H 2 O 2 in 50 mL MetOH, in white containers).

Use citrate buffer pH 6 or Tris-EDTA buffer pH 9 based on antigen desired. Pre-heat antigen retrieval solution in microwave in white containers (~ 50 mL ), for 00:05:00 at full power. Use large plastic container and fill halfway with water.
Transfer slides to white containers with AR solution. Microwave for 00:10:00 at power level 1.
Rest slides at Room temperature for 00:20:00 , change water in bottom of container.
Remove AR solution and wash slides with ddH 2 O for 00:05:00 .
Draw bubble with hydrophobic pen during this wash.
Block with 5% normal goat serum in PBS + 0.1% Triton-x-100 + 0.05% Tween-20, 00:30:00 @ Room temperature ( 300 µL /slide).
Dilute antibody in 5% normal goat serum in PBS + 0.1% Triton-x-100 + 0.05% Tween-20, Overnight at 4 °C ( 300 µL /slide).
Add secondary antibody diluted 1:225 in PBS + 0.1% triton-X + 0.05% tween-20 with 5% normal goat serum (~ 300 µL /slide).
Commonly: biotinylated anti-rabbit IgG (H+L) made in goat (Vector Labs,BA-1000) or biotinylated anti mouse IgG (H+L) made in goat (Vector Labs, BA-9200).
Use DAB or eDAB depending on antigen being detected. For regular DAB:
Add 1 mL of DAB to 150 mL of 50 millimolar (mM) Tris + 50 µL 30% H 2 0 2 .
Dip slides into DAB solution, develop until colour appears ~ 00:03:00 .
For eDAB (SIGMAFAST™ DAB with Metal Enhancer):
Add 1 tablet DAB/Cobalt and 1 tablet Urea Hydrogen Peroxide to 5 mL ddH 2 O, vortex until dissolved. Prepare immediately before use.
Use ~ 300 µL /slide, develop until colour appears ~ 00:03:00 .
Rinse with PBS to stop reaction.
Counterstain with 1:2 Hematoxylin:ddH 2 O, dip slides in quickly.
Remove excess hematoxylin in ddH 2 O; 2X.
Coverslip with permount solution, allow slides to dry before viewing on microscope.
Prepare amplification solution at least 00:30:00 before use.
Amplification with VECTASTAIN® Elite® ABC HRP Kit.
9 µL solution A per mL PBS, vortex; + 9 µL solution B per mL PBS, vortex; ( 300 µL /slide).
Rinse slides with PBS; 3 x 5 minutes
creator: Julianna Tomlinson
